description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Gyllenhammars Havregryn, a Swedish oat product. The box is predominantly red with white and yellow text, featuring the brand name 'Havregryn' in large, bold white letters on the front and sides. The front panel also displays two illustrated figures holding sheaves of oats, along with a yellow banner indicating the product weight of 1 kg. The sides and back of the box are covered with detailed nutritional information, preparation instructions, and other product details in Swedish. The top of the box is also red, with the brand name visible. The packaging appears sturdy and is designed for easy stacking and display in urban retail environments.
description: A red and yellow rectangular cardboard box of Gyllenhammars Havregryn oats, featuring bold white branding and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'Havregryn' branding in white on red, with a yellow panel of text below.
description_view_1: Back view dominated by a large yellow panel with nutritional and product information in Swedish.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with 'Havregryn' branding and a yellow information panel.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main 'Havregryn' branding, two illustrated figures, a yellow banner with preparation info, and the 1 kg weight marking.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'Gyllenhammars' is visible in white script at the top of the front and side panels, above the large 'HAVREGRYN' text. The logo is integrated into the red background.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the side and back panels in yellow text blocks.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Two illustrated figures holding oats are present on the front panel below the main branding.
